text: Implement a real-time importance scoring mechanism using a lightweight, distributed database (e.g., Cassandra) to dynamically weight and prioritize incoming memory entries. This ensures that the agent focuses on the most critical, recently added, and historically significant data, preventing the accumulation of noise and improving the efficiency of our consolidation pattern.
reason: This enhances the plan by ensuring that the most relevant and valuable data is processed first, reducing computational overhead and improving the overall effectiveness of our parallel processing capabilities. The distributed nature of the database allows for scalability and resilience, further optimizing our resource utilization.
